data.body: Disposition: leave as intended (working-as-designed). Mechanism is proven — audit/read.py:156 builds plan_reviews[] only from the REVIEW_RESULT sidecar and never joins the plan-review SIGNATURE (which verify_signature(kind='plan-review') already exposes, fingerprint-matched). It is pure wiring, NOT missing capability. However HEAD commit adbdc5f49 deliberately documents 'audit show is a history view, not a status view … a different store from the SIGNATURE attestation', routing approval/currency to review-plan --status. Surfacing signature in plan_reviews[] would cross that freshly-drawn design boundary, so per owner decision this is closed as working-as-designed rather than auto-wired. Reopen if the history-view scope is later widened to include signature provenance.
